ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the company's CEO */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Type of industry the company operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the financial data */,
  "freight_revenue" REAL /* Freight revenue in millions */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue in millions */,
  "freight_revenue_share" REAL /* Freight revenue share percentage */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Operating expenses for the year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the year */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" REAL /* Year-over-year revenue growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the ranking */,
  "rank_this_year" INTEGER /* Company's rank for the current year */,
  "rank_last_year" INTEGER /* Company's rank for the previous year */,
  "ranking_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for ranking */,
  "industry_rank" INTEGER /* Rank within the specific industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the market */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share percentage */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Size of the market served by the company */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Market growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_category" TEXT /* Category of service offered */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technology" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "tech_category" TEXT /* Category of technology used */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date of technology implementation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory" (
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with the regulation */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the financial data */,
  "stock_price" REAL /* Stock price at the end of the year */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization in billions */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the employee data */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees */,
  "diversity_index" REAL /* Diversity index measuring the diversity of the workforce */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Employee turnover rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the customer data */,
  "satisfaction_score" REAL /* Customer satisfaction score */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Customer retention rate */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer */,
  "customer_lifecycle_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the customer lifecycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
